parameters.description: Navigation direction: "append" for next/older records, "prepend" for previous/newer records

parameters.description: End timestamp (Unix timestamp in milliseconds) to filter records created before this time

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start timestamp (Unix timestamp in milliseconds) to filter records created after this time

get.description: Retrieve all URLs discovered during a website crawl with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor (timestamp from previous response meta)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default: 10, maximum: 100)

parameters.name: affix
parameters.description: Navigation direction: "append" for next/older records, "prepend" for previous/newer records

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start timestamp (Unix timestamp in milliseconds) to filter records created after this time

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End timestamp (Unix timestamp in milliseconds) to filter records created before this time

parameters.name: parentId
parameters.description: Unique ID of the parent crawl (from WebPages collection)

200.description: Discovered URLs retrieved successfully with pagination metadata

urlId.description: Unique identifier for the discovered URL

title.description: Page title extracted from the URL

lastCrawledAt.description: Timestamp when URL was last crawled

limit.description: Records per page limit used for this request

count.description: Number of records returned in this page

previous.description: Navigation info for previous page (newer records). Present only if there are newer records available.

cursor.description: Cursor value to use in next request for previous page

next.description: Navigation info for next page (older records). Present only if there are older records available.

cursor.description: Cursor value to use in next request for next page

400.description: Bad Request - Missing appId header or invalid parameters

500.description: Internal Server Error - Failed to retrieve discovered URLs

basic.description: Process multiple discovered URLs for batch crawling. App ID comes from header.

404.description: No valid discovered URLs found for processing

200.description: Status for requested discovered URLs (omits non-existing uniqueIds)

400.description: Bad Request - Missing appId header or invalid parameters

500.description: Internal Server Error - Failed to retrieve discovered URLs status

post.summary: Get status for multiple discovered URLs

patch.description: Selectively re-process specific discovered URLs that are not excluded. Allows syncing individual URLs within a parent website crawl without processing all discovered URLs.

requestBody.description: Array of discovered URL unique IDs to sync. Only non-excluded URLs will be processed.

sync_specific_urls.description: Process only the specified discovered URLs that are not excluded

400.description: Bad Request - Missing appId header, invalid parameters, or empty uniqueIds array

404.description: No valid non-excluded discovered URLs found for sync processing

500.description: Internal Server Error - Failed to sync discovered URLs

patch.summary: Sync specific discovered URLs for batch processing

info.title: AI Agents APIs
info.description: API reference for CometChat AI Agents service

apiKey.description: API Key with fullAccess scope(i.e. Rest API Key from the Dashboard).
apiKey.name: apikey

icon.description: URL to the icon/avatar of the agent

integrateWith.description: ID of the LLM or platform this agent connects to

integrationType.description: Type of connection: llm or agent

integrationMeta.description: Required if integrationType is "agent". URL where the agent is deployed

suggestions.description: Array of suggestion texts for the agent

metaData.description: Optional metadata object for the agent

icon.description: URL to the icon/avatar of the agent

integrateWith.description: ID of the LLM or platform this agent connects to

integrationType.description: Type of connection: llm or agent

integrationMeta.description: Required if integrationType is "agent". URL where the agent is deployed

suggestions.description: Array of suggestion texts for the agent

metaData.description: Optional metadata object for the agent

displayName.description: Display name shown in the UI for this tool

description.description: Description of what the tool does. Required when doNotExecute is false.
description.example: Fetches current weather data for a given location

executionText.description: Text displayed while the tool is executing

name.description: Unique function name for the tool. Must start with a letter, underscore, or dollar sign, followed by alphanumeric characters, underscores, dollar signs, or hyphens.

doNotExecute.description: When true, the tool will not be executed locally and parameters/description become optional

parameters.description: Tool parameter definitions. Required when doNotExecute is false, but can be an empty object. Must be empty or omitted when doNotExecute is true.

icon.description: URL to the icon/avatar of the agent

tools.description: Array of tool names available to this agent

apiTools.description: Array of API tool names available to this agent

mcpServers.description: Array of MCP server names available to this agent

model.description: AI model to use for this agent

modelMetaData.description: Configuration metadata for the AI model

icon.description: URL to the icon/avatar of the agent

tools.description: Array of tool names available to this agent

apiTools.description: Array of API tool names available to this agent

mcpServers.description: Array of MCP server names available to this agent

model.description: AI model to use for this agent

modelMetaData.description: Configuration metadata for the AI model

tools.description: Array of tool names to add or remove

mcps.description: Array of MCP server slugs to add or remove

apiTools.description: Array of API tool slugs to add or remove

frontendActions.description: Array of frontend action function names to add or remove

uniqueIds.description: Array of file IDs to be added to the knowledge base

actions.description: Array of action names to add or remove

authMeta.description: Credentials or metadata required for authenticating the tool

name.description: Unique variable name. Must start with a letter and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and dots.

description.example: The preferred language of the user

sourceType.description: Source from which the variable value is resolved

sourcePath.description: Dot-notation path to extract the value from the source metadata

constantValue.description: Fixed value used when sourceType is constant

defaultValue.description: Fallback value used when the source path does not resolve

description.example: The preferred language of the user

sourceType.description: Source from which the variable value is resolved

sourcePath.description: Dot-notation path to extract the value from the source metadata

constantValue.description: Fixed value used when sourceType is constant

defaultValue.description: Fallback value used when the source path does not resolve

receiverUid.description: Receiver user ID (defaults to agent ID)

sampleQueryParams.description: Sample query parameters to test resolution

description.example: When to use, preconditions, what it returns

basicAuthUsername.description: Basic auth username (required if enableBasicAuth is true)

basicAuthPassword.description: Basic auth password (required if enableBasicAuth is true)

headers.description: HTTP headers as a JSON string (e.g., '{"Content-Type": "application/json", "Authorization": "Bearer token"}')
